instructions: Answer each question to the best of your ability. Your responses will be reviewed by our engineering team. Write clearly and concisely — focus on demonstrating your reasoning process.

questions.question: Explain closures in JavaScript. Why are they useful, and can you describe a real-world scenario where you would use one?
What is the difference between null and undefined in JavaScript? Give examples of when each might appear.
Describe the event loop in Node.js. How does it handle asynchronous operations differently from a multi-threaded model?
Given an array of integers, write a function that returns two numbers summing to a target. What is the time complexity of your solution?
Explain the concept of database indexing. When would you add an index, and when might it actually hurt performance?
